seoTitle: Semikron Solutions | Motor Drive, Solar Inverter, EV Charging | BeiLuo
seoDescription: Complete Semikron-based solutions for industrial motor drives, solar inverters, EV charging stations, wind power, and power supplies. BOM lists, schematics, design support.

faqs.question: What types of solutions does Semikron offer for industrial applications?
faqs.answer: Semikron provides comprehensive semiconductor solutions for industrial applications: Motor Drive Solutions - Complete power and control solutions for AC motor drives, servo systems, and variable frequency drives using SEMiTRANS IGBT modules, SKiiP IPMs, and SKYPER gate drivers; Solar Inverter Solutions - High-efficiency designs for string inverters and central inverters using Semikron IGBT modules optimized for photovoltaic applications; Power Supply Solutions - Reliable AC-DC conversion for industrial power supplies, battery chargers, and electroplating equipment using thyristors, diodes, and IGBT modules; Wind Power Solutions - High-reliability converters for onshore and offshore wind turbines with extended temperature range operation; EV Charging Solutions - DC fast chargers with high efficiency and wide output voltage range. Each solution includes recommended product combinations, reference designs, and technical documentation.
faqs.decisionGuide: Explore the specific solution categories below to find detailed information about products, benefits, and implementation guidance for your application.

faqs.question: How do I choose between different motor drive solutions?
faqs.answer: Motor drive solution selection depends on power level and application: Low Power (0.75-7.5kW) - SKiiP intelligent power modules for compact HVAC and appliance applications with fast time-to-market; Medium Power (7.5-75kW) - SEMiTRANS 4 IGBT modules with SKYPER gate drivers for standard industrial drives, pumps, and compressors; High Power (75-250kW) - High-current SEMiTRANS modules with parallel configuration for large industrial drives and traction systems; Control Strategy - V/f control for simple applications, FOC for high-performance servo systems. Each solution page provides detailed BOM recommendations, performance specifications, and application guidance. Our FAE team can help optimize the solution for your specific motor type and load characteristics.
faqs.decisionGuide: Click on Motor Drive Solution to explore specific configurations, or contact our FAE team for customized motor drive recommendations.

faqs.question: What solutions does Semikron offer for renewable energy applications?
faqs.answer: Semikron provides comprehensive solutions for renewable energy: Solar Inverters - String inverters (3-50kW) using SKM200GB12T4 IGBT modules for maximum efficiency, central inverters (100kW+) using parallel SKM400GB12T4 modules; Wind Power - Onshore and offshore wind converters using high-power IGBT modules with extended temperature range (-40°C to +85°C) and enhanced thermal cycling capability; Energy Storage - Battery inverters and bidirectional converters using IGBT modules for high-efficiency charge/discharge cycles. Key Technologies - SEMiTRANS 4 modules with silver sintering technology provide 20+ year lifetime for demanding renewable applications. All solutions include grid-tie compliance features and meet relevant safety standards including LVRT requirements.
faqs.decisionGuide: Explore Solar Inverter or Wind Power solutions for detailed product recommendations and technical specifications.

faqs.question: How do Semikron solutions address EV charging applications?
faqs.answer: Semikron offers comprehensive solutions for EV charging infrastructure: DC Fast Chargers - 50-150kW charging stations using SKM200GB12T4 IGBT modules for the main power conversion stage, achieving >96% efficiency; Power Factor Correction - Active front-end using IGBT modules for unity power factor and low THD; Output Stage - Isolated DC-DC converters using high-frequency switching IGBTs for wide output voltage range (200-1000VDC); Protection - Comprehensive overcurrent, overvoltage, and ground fault protection using Semikron's integrated protection features. Safety Features - All EV charging solutions meet IEC 61851 and UL 2202 safety standards. Semikron's high-reliability power semiconductors ensure 24/7 operation in public charging environments with minimal maintenance.
faqs.decisionGuide: Explore EV Charging Station solution to find detailed product recommendations for DC fast charging applications.

faqs.question: What are the benefits of using Semikron reference designs?
faqs.answer: Semikron reference designs accelerate product development: Proven Performance - Designs validated by Semikron engineers with documented test results and efficiency measurements; Complete Documentation - Schematics, PCB layouts, BOMs, and application notes provided; Optimized Pairings - Components selected and tested to work together optimally (IGBTs with gate drivers, thyristors with protection circuits); Reduced Risk - Eliminates guesswork in component selection and circuit design; Faster Time-to-Market - Start with working design and customize for specific requirements; Cost Optimization - BOM optimized for performance and cost based on Semikron's extensive application experience. Reference designs cover motor drives, solar inverters, power supplies, and EV charging applications. BeiLuo Electronics can provide reference design kits and technical support for implementation.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact us to request reference design documentation and evaluation kits for your target application.

faqs.question: How do I select the right solution for my power supply design?
faqs.answer: Power supply solution selection criteria: Power Level - <10kW: Diode rectifiers (SKKD series) for simple AC-DC conversion; 10-50kW: Thyristor-controlled rectifiers (SKKH series) for soft-start and power control; >50kW: Active front-end using IGBT modules for PFC and regeneration; Topology - Passive rectification for cost-sensitive applications, active PFC for high power factor requirements; Efficiency Target - Standard (90-94%): Diode or thyristor solutions; Premium (95-98%): Active PFC with IGBT modules; Input Voltage - 230-690VAC depending on application; Output Requirements - 12-400VDC, current sharing for parallel operation. Each solution page provides topology recommendations, efficiency curves, and detailed BOMs. Our FAE team can assist with custom power supply design.
faqs.decisionGuide: Browse power supply solutions by topology and power level, or contact our FAE team for custom power supply design assistance.

solutions.title: Industrial Motor Drive
solutions.fullTitle: High-Performance Industrial Motor Drive Solution with Semikron IGBT & Gate Driver
solutions.description: Complete power conversion solution for industrial motor drives with high efficiency, reliable performance, and comprehensive protection. Our motor drive solution features Semikron IGBT modules, gate drivers, and rectifiers optimized for AC motor control in industrial automation, HVAC, pump, and fan applications. The solution supports power ratings from 0.75kW to 250kW with input voltages from 230VAC to 690VAC.
solutions.longDescription: This industrial motor drive solution provides complete control of AC induction motors, permanent magnet synchronous motors (PMSM), and brushless DC (BLDC) motors in industrial applications. The solution supports power ratings from 7.5kW to 75kW, making it suitable for pumps, fans, conveyors, machine tools, and robotics applications. The power stage utilizes Semikron's SEMiTRANS 4 IGBT modules (SKM200GB12T4 for higher power, SKM100GB12T4 for lower power) with optimized switching characteristics for motor drive applications. The IGBT modules feature low saturation voltage and fast switching to minimize losses while maintaining excellent short-circuit ruggedness. The control system can be implemented using various MCU platforms, providing the computational power needed for advanced motor control algorithms including field-oriented control (FOC), direct torque control (DTC), and sensorless control. Key features include sensorless startup and operation, field weakening for extended speed range, built-in PID controllers for process control, comprehensive protection (over-current, over-voltage, over-temperature, motor stall), communication interfaces (Modbus RTU/TCP, PROFINET, EtherCAT options), and compliance with IEC 61800 motor drive standards.

designResources.title: AN-2026: Motor Control with Semikron IGBT

systemBenefits: Energy savings up to 30% with variable speed control
Integrated EMC filter reduces installation cost
solutions.seoTitle: Industrial Motor Drive Solution | Semikron IGBT, Gate Driver | 0.75-75kW | BeiLuo
solutions.seoDescription: Complete industrial motor drive solution using Semikron IGBT modules, gate drivers, and rectifiers. VFD control, 0.75-75kW, >97% efficiency. BOM, design files. Contact: +86 15013702378

faqs.question: What are the key design considerations for implementing a motor drive using Semikron IGBT modules?
faqs.answer: Motor drive design with Semikron components requires attention to: Topology Selection - Three-phase bridge inverter using six IGBTs (SKM100GB12T4 for 30-45kW, SKM200GB12T4 for 55-90kW); Control Strategy - Field-oriented control (FOC) for high-performance applications, V/f control for general-purpose drives; Switching Frequency - 4-16kHz for optimal balance between losses and current ripple; Thermal Management - Heatsink selection based on total losses (conduction + switching) and maximum allowable temperature rise; Gate Drive - SKYPER32PRO provides 23A peak current and comprehensive protection; Protection - Overcurrent (desaturation detection), overvoltage (active clamping), overtemperature (NTC monitoring). The BOM includes IGBT modules, gate drivers, rectifier bridges, and DC link capacitors. Our reference design provides complete schematics and PCB layout.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact us for the complete motor drive reference design including schematics, PCB layout, and control software.

faqs.question: How do I optimize efficiency in a motor drive using Semikron IGBT modules?
faqs.answer: Motor drive efficiency optimization with Semikron IGBTs: Switching Frequency - Operate at 4-8kHz for optimal balance between switching losses and motor current ripple; higher frequencies increase losses significantly; Gate Drive Optimization - Use SKYPER32PRO with 3.3-5.6Ω gate resistors for controlled switching speed; too fast increases EMI and voltage overshoot, too slow increases switching losses; PWM Strategy - Space vector PWM (SVPWM) provides better DC bus utilization and lower ripple than sine-triangle PWM; Dead Time - Minimize dead time (typically 2-3μs) to reduce diode conduction losses while preventing shoot-through; Thermal Design - Maintain junction temperature below 125°C for optimal Vce(sat) characteristics; Control Algorithm - Field-oriented control (FOC) with encoder feedback provides better dynamic response and efficiency than V/f control. Expected efficiency: 96-98% for 10-75kW drives at rated load.
faqs.decisionGuide: Request our motor drive reference design with optimized gate drive and control software for maximum efficiency.

faqs.question: What protection features are implemented in the Semikron motor drive solution?
faqs.answer: The Semikron motor drive solution includes comprehensive protection: Overcurrent Protection - Desaturation detection in SKYPER gate drivers with <2μs response time and soft turn-off to prevent voltage spikes; Overvoltage Protection - Active clamping circuits and brake chopper IGBT for regenerative energy; Overtemperature Protection - NTC sensors in IGBT modules monitor junction temperature with shutdown at 125°C; Undervoltage Protection - UVLO in gate drivers prevents operation with insufficient gate voltage; Short-Circuit Protection - Hardware-based protection with <10μs response for phase-to-phase and phase-to-ground faults; Motor Stall Protection - Software detection of locked rotor condition with automatic restart; Ground Fault Protection - Leakage current monitoring for safety. All protection features are coordinated between hardware (gate drivers) and software (microcontroller) for reliable fault handling and system protection.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact our automotive FAE team for detailed safety concept documentation and design review services for motor drive protection systems.

customerCases.challenge: Original inverter used discrete components with high failure rate and maintenance costs. Required improved system reliability and reduced after-sales costs.
customerCases.solution: Adopted integrated solution based on SKM200GB12T4 and SKYPER32PRO, replacing original discrete IGBTs and driver circuits. Optimized thermal design with forced air cooling replacing water cooling, simplifying system structure.
customerCases.results: System reliability improved with MTBF increasing from 15,000 hours to 50,000 hours. After-sales failure rate reduced by 70%, maintenance costs saved by approximately 40%. Customer satisfaction significantly improved.
customerCases.quote: Semikron's modular solution greatly simplified our design, with reliability far exceeding expectations
customerCases.result: Achieved significant performance improvement with enhanced reliability.

customerCases.challenge: Required high-precision servo control with fast dynamic response, while needing compact size and low cost to meet mass production demands.
customerCases.solution: Adopted SKiiP32NAB12T1 intelligent power module with integrated drivers and protection, significantly simplifying PCB design. Combined with dedicated servo control algorithms to implement high-precision torque control.
customerCases.results: Drive volume reduced by 35%, cost reduced by 20%. Servo response time <1ms, meeting high-speed textile process requirements. Product successfully mass-produced and exported to European markets.
customerCases.quote: The integration level of SKiiP modules allowed us to quickly launch products and seize market opportunities
customerCases.result: Achieved significant performance improvement with enhanced reliability.

faeInsights.insight: In the industrial motor drive field, Semikron's SEMiTRANS 4 series IGBT modules have become the mainstream choice for medium-power inverters due to their outstanding cost-performance ratio and reliability. Over my 15-year career participating in more than 200 motor drive projects, I have found that SKM100GB12T4 and SKM200GB12T4 perform exceptionally well in the 30-90kW power range. They adopt IGBT4 chip technology with reduced saturation voltage and excellent temperature stability, which is crucial for high-temperature industrial environments. The silver sintering package technology significantly improves module thermal cycling lifetime, which is especially important for pump and fan applications requiring frequent start-stop operations.
faeInsights.logic: Motor drive selection decision framework: First determine power level and voltage level - 30-45kW select SKM100GB12T4, 55-90kW select SKM200GB12T4; Second consider switching frequency - 4-8kHz is the optimal frequency range for industrial drives; Then evaluate thermal conditions - standard SEMiTRANS 4 package fits most industrial heatsinks; Finally select matching drivers - SKYPER32PRO provides the best protection functionality and reliability. For cost-sensitive and lower power applications, consider SKiiP series intelligent power modules which integrate drivers and protection, significantly shortening development cycles.
keyTakeaways: SEMiTRANS 4 series is the best choice for 30-90kW industrial drives
Silver sintering technology significantly improves thermal cycling lifetime, suitable for frequent start-stop applications
SKYPER32PRO drivers provide comprehensive protection functionality
4-8kHz switching frequency is the optimal balance between efficiency and EMI
SKiiP series suitable for rapid development and cost-sensitive applications
commonPitfalls: Neglecting thermal design leads to module overheating failure
Improper gate resistor selection causes excessive switching losses or EMI issues
Dead time set too small leads to bridge arm shoot-through damaging IGBT
bestPractices: Reserve 30% or more current margin to improve system reliability
Adopt SVPWM modulation to improve DC bus utilization
Implement comprehensive fault protection strategy including hardware and software two-level protection
Regularly perform thermal imaging checks to discover thermal problems in time
faeInsights.content: Based on extensive experience supporting customers with Industrial Motor Drive, this solution addresses critical design challenges through proven architecture. The implementation achieves optimal balance between performance, reliability, and cost-effectiveness.

solutions.name: Industrial Control Solution 1

solutions.title: Solar Inverter
solutions.fullTitle: High-Efficiency Solar String Inverter Solution with Semikron IGBT
solutions.description: High-efficiency power conversion solution for solar inverters with maximum power point tracking (MPPT), grid compliance, and reliable operation. Our solar inverter solution features Semikron IGBT modules and gate drivers optimized for photovoltaic power conversion. The solution supports string inverters from 3kW to 50kW and central inverters up to 250kW with MPPT efficiency up to 99.9%.
solutions.longDescription: This solar string inverter solution delivers industry-leading efficiency for residential and commercial photovoltaic (PV) systems. The solution supports power ratings from 10kW to 50kW, with MPPT (Maximum Power Point Tracking) efficiency exceeding 99.9% and European efficiency up to 98.5%. The design leverages Semikron's complete portfolio of power semiconductors optimized for solar applications. The DC-AC inverter stage employs Semikron IGBT modules (SKM200GB12T4) for reliable grid-tied operation. The modules feature low saturation voltage and fast switching to maximize efficiency across the entire operating range. The control system can be implemented using various MCU platforms, which provide the processing power for advanced MPPT algorithms, grid monitoring, and communication functions. Key features include dual MPPT inputs for flexible array configuration, integrated DC disconnect, anti-islanding protection, ground fault detection, arc fault detection (AFCI), grid support functions (low voltage ride-through, reactive power control), and communication interfaces (RS485, Ethernet, Wi-Fi, cellular options) for remote monitoring.

bomList.function: DC-AC inverter stage for grid connection

technicalSpecs.protection: DC reverse polarity, Overcurrent, Overvoltage, Islanding, Ground fault

systemBenefits: Maximum energy harvest with dual MPPT

customerCases.result: Achieved significant performance improvement with enhanced reliability.

customerCases.results: Charge/discharge efficiency both achieved above 97.5%, system power density reached 1.2kW/L. Product passed CE certification and successfully entered European energy storage market.
customerCases.quote: Semikron modules' high efficiency and reliability give our energy storage products competitive advantage
customerCases.result: Achieved significant performance improvement with enhanced reliability.

faeInsights.insight: In the solar inverter field, efficiency is the lifeline. Over the past 8 years participating in more than 50 solar inverter projects, I have deeply experienced the decisive impact of device selection on system efficiency. Semikron's SEMiTRANS 4 series IGBT modules adopt the latest IGBT4 chip technology, achieving an excellent balance between conduction voltage drop and switching losses. Especially at 16-20kHz switching frequency, SKM200GB12T4's comprehensive losses are about 15% lower than the previous generation, which directly translates to higher inverter efficiency and lower thermal costs. For 20-50kW power range solar inverters, I strongly recommend SKM200GB12T4, whose high cost-performance ratio and outstanding reliability have been verified by many mainstream inverter manufacturers.
faeInsights.logic: Solar inverter selection decision framework: First determine power level - 10-20kW select SKM100GB12T4, 20-50kW select SKM200GB12T4; Second determine topology structure - single-stage or two-stage, which affects IGBT voltage level selection; Then evaluate thermal conditions - high-temperature environments require larger current margins; Finally consider cost factors - SEMiTRANS 4 series achieves a good balance between performance and price. For applications requiring higher integration, consider SKiiP series intelligent power modules.
keyTakeaways: SKM200GB12T4 is the best choice for 20-50kW solar inverters
16-20kHz switching frequency achieves the best balance between efficiency and EMI
European efficiency above 98% requires careful loss optimization
Thermal design must consider high-temperature environment derating
Grid code certification requires advance planning to avoid later rework
commonPitfalls: Neglecting device derating in high-temperature environments leads to summer efficiency degradation
Improper MPPT algorithm selection causes significant efficiency loss in partial shading scenarios
Insufficient EMC design leads to repeated certification test rework
bestPractices: Reserve 20% or more current margin to ensure reliability under high-temperature high-load conditions
Adopt advanced MPPT algorithms such as improved incremental conductance method
Perform thermal simulation during design phase to optimize heatsink selection
Early EMC pre-compliance testing to discover problems in time
faeInsights.content: Based on extensive experience supporting customers with Solar Inverter, this solution addresses critical design challenges through proven architecture. The implementation achieves optimal balance between performance, reliability, and cost-effectiveness.

solutions.name: Automotive Electronics Solution 2

solutions.title: Industrial Power Supply
solutions.fullTitle: High-Power Industrial Power Supply Solution with Semikron Thyristor & Diode
solutions.description: Reliable AC-DC conversion solution for industrial power supplies with high power factor correction (PFC), low harmonic distortion, and high efficiency. Our power supply solution features Semikron thyristor modules, diode bridges, and IGBT modules optimized for telecom, industrial, and medical power supplies. The solution supports power ratings from 1kW to 50kW with output voltages from 12VDC to 400VDC.
solutions.longDescription:
The Consumer Electronics Solution 3 from semikron represents a comprehensive approach to addressing modern challenges in Industrial. This solution integrates advanced semiconductor technology with robust design methodologies to deliver exceptional performance and reliability.

At the core of this solution is a carefully selected portfolio of semikron components optimized for the target application. The design leverages the latest advances in power management, signal processing, and thermal management to achieve industry-leading efficiency and performance metrics.

Key technical features include high-efficiency power conversion, precise control algorithms, and comprehensive protection mechanisms. The solution supports wide operating ranges and maintains performance across varying environmental conditions. Advanced monitoring and diagnostic capabilities enable predictive maintenance and optimize system uptime.

Implementation is streamlined through comprehensive design support including reference designs, simulation models, and detailed application notes. BeiLuo's FAE team provides expert guidance throughout the development cycle from concept through production. Customization options are available to address specific application requirements.

The solution has been validated through extensive testing including functional verification, environmental stress screening, and long-term reliability assessment. Field deployment data demonstrates consistent performance and high customer satisfaction across diverse applications and operating conditions.

customerCases.challenge: Required development of 5000A/12V high-power electroplating power supply with adjustable output voltage, low ripple, high reliability, and 24-hour continuous operation.
customerCases.solution: Adopted SKKH570/16E thyristors to form three-phase fully controlled rectifier bridge, achieving 0-100% voltage adjustment. Combined with large capacity filter inductors and capacitors to control output ripple within 3%. Optimized thermal design with water cooling heatsinks.
customerCases.results: Output voltage stability ±1%, ripple <3%. System efficiency >92%, MTBF exceeded 30,000 hours. Equipment has been stably operating for 3 years, customer very satisfied.
customerCases.quote: Semikron thyristors' high reliability ensures our equipment's continuous stable operation
customerCases.result: Achieved significant performance improvement with enhanced reliability.

customerCases.challenge: Developed 10kW/48V telecom power supply requiring power factor >0.95, efficiency >95%, meeting N+1 redundancy configuration, with limited volume.
customerCases.solution: Front stage adopted SKM100GB12T4 to build three-phase active PFC, rear stage adopted full-bridge LLC resonant converter. Adopted high-frequency design (100kHz) to reduce magnetic component volume. Rectifier output adopted SKKD160/16 three-phase bridge.
customerCases.results: Power factor 0.98, efficiency 96.5%, power density reached 15W/in³. Passed Telcordia SR-332 reliability certification, meeting telecom-grade application requirements.
customerCases.quote: Semikron IGBT's low loss characteristics allow our power supply efficiency to reach industry-leading levels
customerCases.result: Achieved significant performance improvement with enhanced reliability.

faeInsights.insight: Industrial power supply design is a system engineering task requiring balance between efficiency, cost, and reliability. In my 14-year FAE career, participating in hundreds of industrial power supply projects, I deeply understand the importance of device selection. Semikron's power semiconductor product line is very complete, from diodes and thyristors to IGBT modules, meeting various industrial power supply needs. For applications requiring voltage adjustment, I strongly recommend SKKH570/16E thyristor modules, whose dv/dt withstand capability up to 1000V/μs performs excellently in harsh industrial grid conditions. For high power factor applications, SKM100GB12T4 is the ideal choice for 10-30kW active PFC, with low conduction voltage drop and fast switching characteristics helping achieve high efficiency.
faeInsights.logic: Industrial power supply selection decision framework: First determine whether voltage adjustment is needed - if yes select thyristors (SKKH series), if fixed voltage select diodes (SKKD series) or active PFC; Second determine power level - <10kW consider single-phase solution, >10kW recommend three-phase solution; Then evaluate efficiency requirements - >95% efficiency requires active PFC; Finally consider cost factors - diode solution has lowest cost, active PFC has highest cost but best performance. For high power (>50kW) applications, recommend IGBT active front end for PFC and energy regeneration.
keyTakeaways: SKKH570/16E is the best choice for applications requiring voltage adjustment
SKKD160/16 is the ideal solution for cost-sensitive fixed voltage applications
Active PFC can achieve >0.99 power factor and <5% THD
Thermal design must consider worst-case and aging factors
Industrial power supplies must meet IEC 61000-3-2 harmonic standards
commonPitfalls: Neglecting impact of grid voltage fluctuation on device stress
Insufficient heatsink design margin leads to device overheating in summer high temperatures
Insufficient EMI filter design leads to conducted emission exceeding standards
bestPractices: Reserve 30% or more current margin to handle grid fluctuations
Adopt soft-start circuit to limit startup inrush current
Design comprehensive protection functions (overcurrent, overvoltage, overtemperature)
Perform thorough thermal testing and aging validation
faeInsights.content: Based on extensive experience supporting customers with Industrial Power Supply, this solution addresses critical design challenges through proven architecture. The implementation achieves optimal balance between performance, reliability, and cost-effectiveness.

solutions.name: Consumer Electronics Solution 3

solutions.title: Wind Power Converter
solutions.fullTitle: Wind Turbine Power Converter Solution with Semikron High-Power IGBT Modules
solutions.description: Complete power conversion solution for wind turbines with grid compliance, low voltage ride-through (LVRT), and reliable operation in harsh environments. Our wind power solution features Semikron high-power IGBT modules and gate drivers optimized for wind turbine converters. The solution supports turbine ratings from 1.5MW to 5MW with medium voltage output up to 690VAC.
solutions.longDescription: This wind power converter solution is designed for demanding wind turbine applications, providing reliable power conversion in harsh environmental conditions. The solution supports both doubly-fed induction generator (DFIG) and full-scale converter configurations for wind turbines ranging from 1.5MW to 5MW rated power. The power stage utilizes Semikron's high-power IGBT modules (SKM400GB12T4) specifically selected for wind power applications. These modules feature enhanced thermal cycling capability, low failure rates, and extended lifetime to match the 20+ year operational requirements of wind turbines. The control system employs industrial-grade components with extended temperature range operation (-40°C to +85°C ambient). Redundant control architectures are supported for maximum availability. The system includes comprehensive monitoring and diagnostics for predictive maintenance. Key features include low voltage ride-through (LVRT) capability for grid code compliance, reactive power control for grid support, active damping for mechanical resonance suppression, pitch control integration, comprehensive condition monitoring, and remote diagnostics capabilities.

technicalSpecs.protection: Overcurrent, Overvoltage, DC link monitoring, Thermal protection

systemBenefits: Full-scale converter for variable speed operation

customerCases.challenge: Developed high-reliability 2.5MW DFIG wind turbine converter requiring compliance with Chinese grid LVRT requirements, MTBF >80,000 hours, adapting to -30°C to +50°C environment.
customerCases.solution: Adopted SKM400GB12T4 as core power device to build rotor-side and grid-side converters. Optimized control algorithms for fast LVRT response. Adopted forced air cooling + heat pipe cooling solution.
customerCases.results: Converter passed China Electric Power Research Institute LVRT certification, MTBF reached 100,000 hours. Successfully matched with over 500 turbines, cumulative operation exceeded 2 million hours, failure rate below 1%.
customerCases.quote: Semikron IGBT's high reliability and BeiLuo's technical support are guarantees of our wind turbine success
customerCases.result: Achieved significant performance improvement with enhanced reliability.

customerCases.application: 4MW Offshore Wind Turbine Full Power Converter
customerCases.challenge: Developed offshore wind turbine full power converter requiring protection level IP54, salt spray corrosion resistance, maintenance-free design life 25 years, meeting harsh offshore environment.
customerCases.solution: Adopted full power topology with SKM400GB12T4 for both machine-side and grid-side. System adopted sealed design with internal positive pressure ventilation. Key circuit boards coated with three-proof paint, connectors adopted gold-plating treatment.
customerCases.results: Converter passed DNV GL certification, protection level reached IP54, passed 3000-hour salt spray test. First prototype has been operating offshore for 2 years in good condition.
customerCases.quote: Semikron modules' high reliability allows our offshore wind turbines to withstand harsh environment tests
customerCases.result: Achieved significant performance improvement with enhanced reliability.

faeInsights.insight: Wind turbine converters are the core components of wind turbine units, and their reliability directly determines power generation efficiency and availability. In my 16 years of wind power industry experience, I have witnessed the development of wind power technology from kilowatt-level to megawatt-level. Semikron's SKM400GB12T4 is the ideal choice for wind turbine converters, with its 400A rated current and 1200V withstand voltage meeting the needs of 2-5MW turbines. Particularly noteworthy is its silver sintering packaging technology, which compared to traditional solder packaging, improves thermal cycling lifetime by 3-5 times, which is crucial for wind power applications with frequent start-stop operations. I have seen at multiple wind farms that converters using Semikron modules still in good condition after 5+ years of operation, fully proving their reliability.
faeInsights.logic: Wind turbine converter selection decision framework: First determine turbine power and topology - 1.5-3MW DFIG turbine rotor-side converter select SKM200GB12T4, grid-side select SKM400GB12T4; 3-5MW full power converter machine-side and grid-side both select SKM400GB12T4; Second consider environmental conditions - offshore wind power requires higher protection level and anti-corrosion design; Then evaluate grid requirements - weak grid areas recommend full power topology; Finally consider maintainability - offshore wind power should minimize maintenance requirements. Recommend reserving sufficient current margin to handle wind speed  overload situations.
keyTakeaways: SKM400GB12T4 is the best choice for 2-5MW wind turbine converters
Silver sintering packaging technology significantly improves thermal cycling lifetime
DFIG topology suitable for onshore, full power topology suitable for offshore
LVRT function is a basic requirement for grid connection
Offshore wind power requires special attention to protection and anti-corrosion
commonPitfalls: Neglecting impact of thermal cycling on module lifetime
Insufficient LVRT design leads to grid-off during grid faults
Insufficient offshore wind power protection design leads to salt spray corrosion
bestPractices: Reserve 50% or more current margin to handle wind speed
Adopt predictive maintenance with real-time monitoring of key parameters
Design comprehensive fault protection strategy
Perform thorough type testing and field testing
faeInsights.content: Based on extensive experience supporting customers with Wind Power Converter, this solution addresses critical design challenges through proven architecture. The implementation achieves optimal balance between performance, reliability, and cost-effectiveness.

solutions.name: Communication Systems Solution 4

solutions.title: EV Charging Station
solutions.fullTitle: Electric Vehicle Charging Station Solution with Semikron Power Semiconductors
solutions.description: Complete power conversion solution for electric vehicle charging stations with high efficiency, fast charging, and comprehensive protection. Our EV charging solution features Semikron IGBT modules and gate drivers optimized for DC fast chargers. The solution supports charging power from 50kW to 350kW with output voltage from 200VDC to 1000VDC.
solutions.longDescription: This comprehensive EV charging station solution leverages Semikron's complete portfolio of power semiconductors to deliver industry-leading efficiency, power density, and reliability. The solution supports DC fast charging (up to 150kW) configurations, making it suitable for commercial and public charging infrastructure. The power stage utilizes Semikron's IGBT modules (SKM200GB12T4) for the main power conversion, combined with rectifier bridges (SKKD160/16) for AC-DC conversion. This approach optimizes efficiency across the entire operating range while minimizing system cost. The gate drive stage employs SKYPER gate drivers (SKYPER32PRO) with integrated protection features for reliable operation. Key features include power factor correction (PFC) for grid compliance, galvanic isolation for safety, comprehensive protection (over-current, over-voltage, over-temperature, ground fault), communication interfaces (CAN, Ethernet, PLC for smart grid integration), and compliance with CHAdeMO, CCS, and GB/T charging standards.

technicalSpecs.protection: Overcurrent, Overvoltage, Overtemperature, Ground fault, Emergency stop

solutions.seoTitle: EV Charging Station Solution | Semikron IGBT, Gate Driver | 50-150kW | BeiLuo
solutions.seoDescription: Complete EV charging station solution using Semikron IGBT modules, rectifiers, and gate drivers. >96% efficiency, 50-150kW. BOM, schematics, design support. Contact: +86 15013702378

customerCases.challenge: Developed 120kW DC fast charger requiring peak efficiency >96%, supporting 200-750V wide voltage output, meeting CCS2 and GB/T dual protocols, passing CE certification.
customerCases.solution: Adopted SKM200GB12T4 to build three-phase PWM rectifier and LLC resonant converter. Adopted dual-gun design supporting intelligent power allocation. Configured 15.6-inch touch screen and 4G communication module.
customerCases.results: Peak efficiency 96.5%, power density 1.2kW/L. Passed CE certification and State Grid grid connection test. Over 1,000 units deployed, average failure interval time >20,000 hours.
customerCases.quote: Semikron IGBT's high efficiency significantly reduces our charging station operating costs
customerCases.result: Achieved significant performance improvement with enhanced reliability.

customerCases.challenge: Developed 480kW super charging station for high-end vehicles requiring peak power 480kW, supporting 800V high-voltage platform, charging 5 minutes for 200km range.
customerCases.solution: Adopted modular design with each module 60kW, total 8 modules in parallel. Power modules adopted SKM200GB12T4 with liquid cooling. Rectifier cabinet separated from charging terminal design supporting multi-vehicle simultaneous charging.
customerCases.results: Peak efficiency 97%, supporting 200-1000V wide voltage output. Successfully applied to multiple super charging stations with good user experience, charging speed achieved design goals.
customerCases.quote: Semikron modules' high power density and reliability are key to our super fast charging implementation
customerCases.result: Achieved significant performance improvement with enhanced reliability.

faeInsights.insight: Charging stations are key infrastructure in the new energy vehicle ecosystem, and their performance and reliability directly impact user charging experience. I have worked in the charging station industry for 10 years, witnessing charging power development from 50kW to 350kW and even higher. Semikron's SKM200GB12T4 is the ideal choice for charging station power modules, with its 200A rated current and 1200V withstand voltage meeting the needs of 50-150kW charging stations. Particularly noteworthy is its excellent short-circuit withstand capability and fast switching characteristics, which are crucial for charging station safety and efficiency. I have found in multiple charging station projects that solutions using Semikron modules perform excellently in both efficiency and reliability, with peak efficiency reaching above 96%.
faeInsights.logic: Charging station selection decision framework: First determine power level - below 60kW can use single module, 60-150kW recommend dual module parallel, above 150kW use multi-module parallel; Second determine voltage platform - below 750V platform select 1200V devices (SKM200GB12T4), 800V and above select 1700V devices; Then consider cooling method - air cooling suitable for low power and indoor applications, liquid cooling suitable for high power and outdoor applications; Finally consider communication protocols - select CCS, CHAdeMO or GB/T based on target market. Recommend reserving 20% or more power margin to handle grid fluctuations and battery fast charging demands.
keyTakeaways: SKM200GB12T4 is the best choice for 50-150kW charging stations
Two-stage architecture (rectifier + DC-DC) can achieve wide voltage output and high efficiency
Liquid cooling can achieve higher power density
Safety protection functions must meet IEC 61851 requirements
Communication protocols must be selected based on target market
commonPitfalls: Neglecting impact of grid voltage fluctuation on output power
Insufficient thermal design leads to power derating in summer high temperatures
Insufficient EMC design leads to communication interference
bestPractices: Reserve 20% or more power margin
Adopt modular design for easy maintenance and expansion
Design comprehensive protection functions (overvoltage, overcurrent, overtemperature, insulation)
Perform thorough type testing and field testing
faeInsights.content: Based on extensive experience supporting customers with EV Charging Station, this solution addresses critical design challenges through proven architecture. The implementation achieves optimal balance between performance, reliability, and cost-effectiveness.
